main-content.metadata: Ask your health query by voice in any language

is_district_enabled.description: Always true — district is always required

appointment.__example__:
Beauty & Personal Care Department at Kings Cross, London
Mon Jan 01 2024 at 11:30.

details.__example__:
Name: John Doe
Email: john@example.com
Phone: 123456789

A free skin care consultation, please

more_details.__example__: A free skin care consultation, please

children.text: By proceeding, you agree that appointments are subject to hospital and doctor availability and are provisional until confirmed. Please arrive 15–30 minutes early with a valid ID, medical records, and pension details if applicable. Ensure all information provided is accurate, as incomplete or incorrect details may lead to cancellation. The hospital reserves the right to reschedule or cancel appointments due to operational reasons without prior notice. This service is for appointment facilitation only and does not provide medical advice or emergency care — for emergencies, visit the nearest hospital immediately. Your personal data will be used solely for appointment and healthcare communication purposes.

result_text.__example__:
🏥 Cardiology OPD
Hospital: Osmania General Hospital

Full OPD details will be sent to your WhatsApp.

report_summary.__example__:
Patient: John Doe
Report Date: 05 Jun 2026

Complete Blood Count (CBC)
- Haemoglobin: 13.5 g/dL (Normal)
- WBC: 7200 /µL (Normal)
- Platelets: 2.5 Lac /µL (Normal)

children.text: For detailed reports, please visit your nearest hospital or contact the lab.
Describe your symptoms or ask a health question

children.label: Your Health Query
children.name: query
children.helper-text: e.g. I have a fever for 2 days with headache. What should I do?

ai_response.__example__:
Based on your symptoms (fever and headache for 2 days), here is some general guidance:

1. Stay hydrated - drink plenty of water
2. Rest adequately
3. You may take paracetamol for fever relief
4. If fever exceeds 103°F or persists beyond 3 days, please consult a doctor immediately

⚠️ This is general health information only. For medical advice, please consult a qualified doctor.

children.text: Disclaimer: This is general health information only and not a substitute for professional medical advice.

__example__.title: Nizam's Institute of Medical Sciences (NIMS), Hyderabad

children.text: Select an emergency guide and we will send the video to your WhatsApp.
Ask your health question by voice in any language. After you tap Confirm, we'll message you on WhatsApp — just record and send a voice note, and you'll get an audio reply.
⚠️ General health information only — not a substitute for professional medical advice.

specialties.__example__: General Medicine, Cardiology, Neurology, Orthopedics, Surgery, Psychiatry
